steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The text needs a sentence that provides an example of a particle physicist — a specific, named individual who works in the field.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — general neutrino research statement: Discusses neutrinos without naming any physicist. No example given. ✗
  • Choice B — neutrino detection methods: Describes research techniques but still names no individual physicist. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Gianpaolo Bellini ... solar and geoneutrinos': Names a specific particle physicist and describes his research focus — exactly the example the text requires. ✓
  • Choice D — neutrino properties discussion: A general claim about neutrinos, no named physicist. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
